data.title: UPDATE: add Figma and Confluence integration questions to Phase 2 Socratic dialogue in SKILL.md
data.description:
## Story
0487-f12b

## testing_mode
UPDATE

## What
Add #### 9. Figma Design Collaboration and #### 10. Confluence Documentation Space sections after #### 8. Jira Bridge in Phase 2 Socratic Dialogue.

## Section 9: Figma Design Collaboration
- Label as optional/skippable with one-sentence explanation
- Ask whether project uses Figma for design collaboration
- On YES: write design.figma_collaboration=true to .claude/dso-config.conf (non-sensitive — actual PAT stays as env var FIGMA_PAT)
- On skip/no: write design.figma_collaboration=false (explicit disabled sentinel)
- Credentials (FIGMA_PAT): reference as env var, never in config

## Section 10: Confluence Documentation Space
- Label as optional placeholder (integration coming soon per adversarial review) with one-sentence explanation
- Ask whether project uses Confluence
- On YES: write confluence.space_key=<KEY> (non-sensitive identifier)
- On skip/no: write confluence.enabled=false (explicit disabled sentinel)

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md — add sections 9 and 10 between #### 8. Jira Bridge and ### Phase 2 Gate

## Acceptance Criteria
- Section 9 (Figma) and Section 10 (Confluence) added after Jira section
- Each labeled skippable with explanation
- Credentials never written to config — only non-sensitive identifiers
- Skip path writes explicit disabled sentinel
- test_integration_questions_present passes GREEN
